days.summary: Google shipped Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, a new speech model with granular audio tags for fine-grained control over expressive voice generation, extending Gemini’s multimodal product stack into higher-quality audio output. ByteDance Seed unveiled Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM for real-time, interruption-tolerant voice interaction, while Zhipu AI and Intel expanded their partnership to put on-device Qingyan and CodeGeeX on AI PCs—signaling continued competition around edge AI assistants and speech interfaces.
